hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(secret|secrets|([^a-zA-Z]|^)keys?[^a-zA-Z].*\.json|([^a-zA-Z]|^)keys?\.json|\.env)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit sensitive files' && exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(secret|secrets|([^a-zA-Z]|^)keys?[^a-zA-Z].*\.json|([^a-zA-Z]|^)keys?\.json|\.env)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot write to sensitive files' && exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(^|&&|;|\|)\s*(git|gt) add (-A|--all|\.)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Stage specific files instead of git/gt add -A or git/gt add .' && exit 1; fi
